entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species Pennisetum glaucum analyzed for genetic polymorphism and mapping.

entities.name: GENOMIC DNA PROBES
entities.description: DNA sequences used to detect polymorphism in pearl millet genotypes.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Genetic variation detected among diverse pearl millet genotypes.

entities.name: RESTRICTION ENZYMES
entities.description: Enzymes used in combination with probes to detect genetic polymorphism.

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism, the technique used to construct the genetic map.

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A representation of the genetic loci of pearl millet.

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: An intervarietal population derived from a single F1 plant used for linkage mapping.

entities.name: LOCI
entities.description: Specific genetic positions mapped onto the linkage map.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A map showing the relative positions of loci on chromosomes.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of loci that are inherited together, forming the structure of the linkage map.

entities.name: CLONES
entities.description: DNA fragments used to detect loci in the pearl millet genome.

entities.name: TRANSLOCATION BREAKPOINT
entities.description: A point of chromosomal translocation identified within a large linkage group.
